title: GoStream
description: A high-throughput event-streaming platform built on Go and Kafka. Handles 50k+ events/sec with sub-10ms P99 latency. Includes a real-time dashboard and alerting engine.

title: PocketAuth
description: A zero-dependency JWT + OAuth2 authentication microservice in pure Go. Drop-in integration for any backend. Ships with an admin UI for managing users and scopes.

title: Cartographer
description: CLI + web tool for visualising PostgreSQL schema changes across migrations. Generates interactive ER diagrams and diffs as SVG — no GUI needed.

title: Quicknote
description: An end-to-end encrypted personal note-taking app with offline-first PWA support. AES-256 encryption in the browser; the server never sees plaintext.
